PROFILE.TITLE: Profile Settings
PROFILE.DESCRIPTION: Manage your profile and sign-in details.

USERS.TITLE: Users
USERS.DESCRIPTION: Manage and invite team members to your Workspace.

ROLES_PERMISSIONS.TITLE: Roles & Permissions
ROLES_PERMISSIONS.DESCRIPTION: Manage roles and permissions for your Workspace.

TEAMS.TITLE: Teams
TEAMS.DESCRIPTION: Create and manage teams to group the users in your Workspace.

CHANNELS.TITLE: Channels
CHANNELS.DESCRIPTION: Manage your messaging channels and discover new ones to help you acquire more customers.

WHATSAPP_TEMPLATES.TITLE: WhatsApp Templates
WHATSAPP_TEMPLATES.DESCRIPTION: Create and manage WhatsApp templates to be used in Messages, Broadcasts, and Workflows.

GROWTH_WIDGETS.TITLE: Growth Widgets
GROWTH_WIDGETS.DESCRIPTION: Create and manage widgets that can be embedded on your website to grow your contacts.

CONTACT_FIELDS.TITLE: Contact Fields
CONTACT_FIELDS.DESCRIPTION: Create and manage contact fields to save additional information about your contacts.

INTEGRATIONS.TITLE: Integrations
INTEGRATIONS.DESCRIPTION: Connect your respond.io Workspace with third-party integrations.

AI.TITLE: AI
AI.DESCRIPTION: Leverage Respond AI to enhance your customers' experience and elevate your customer service

CLOSING_NOTES.TITLE: Closing Notes
CLOSING_NOTES.DESCRIPTION: Manage closing notes settings and conversation categories of the workspace.

SNIPPETS.TITLE: Snippets
SNIPPETS.DESCRIPTION: Create canned responses to be used in Messages, Broadcasts, and Workflows.

TAGS.TITLE: Tags
TAGS.DESCRIPTION: Create and manage Tags to organize conversations and inboxes

FILES.TITLE: Files
FILES.DESCRIPTION: Store files to be used in Messages, Broadcasts, and Workflows.

DATA_EXPORT.TITLE: Data Export
DATA_EXPORT.DESCRIPTION: Export workspace related records for further data analytics and other purposes.

DATA_IMPORT.TITLE: Data Import
DATA_IMPORT.DESCRIPTION: Review previous imports or start a new import.

ORGANIZATION_SETTINGS.TITLE: Organization
ORGANIZATION_SETTINGS.DESCRIPTION: Manage your organization information and settings.

ORGANIZATION_SECURITY.TITLE: Organization Security
ORGANIZATION_SECURITY.DESCRIPTION: Manage your organization security settings here.

ORGANIZATION_BILLING.TITLE: Organization Billing
ORGANIZATION_BILLING.DESCRIPTION: Manage your plan & billing information here.
